synopsis:
Luke Skywalker, Lando Calrissian, and Chewbacca blast off from the planet Arbra in the *Millennium Falcon*, bound for a meeting with a seedy merchant named Orion Ferret at a space station known as Bazarre.

Meanwhile, Princess Leia rejoins the Rebel fleet stationed above Arbra and attempts a bold maneuver to conceal the fleet from Imperial scouts. Using a Kerts-Bhrg field generator, the Rebels construct a pyramid-shaped force field that envelops the entire fleet and move the ships within the corona of Arbra's sun, trusting the generator to shield them from the deadly ultraviolet rays. As Leia boards a shuttle to return to the surface, the generators malfunction. An absorption circuit in the control generator overloads, flooding the maintenance bay with noxious fumes and knocking out all the service personnel. Only the droids C-3PO and R2-D2 are unaffected, and they space-walk out to run a conduit cable into the generator and stabilize the failing power levels, averting disaster. As the crisis passes, the *Millennium Falcon* emerges from lightspeed and arrives at Bazarre.
title: Star Wars (1977) #58: Sundown!
